description: Counts registered passenger cars by valid seat count (1–9) and exposes missing and corrupt seat records. Use for 2-seater, 4-seater, 7-seater, 8-seater, or more-than-N-seat questions. Seats field: KoeretoejOplysningSiddepladserMinimum. Note: count 0 and values above 9 are corrupt and bucketed separately.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | EVAL seats = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningSiddepladserMinimum, seat_bucket = CASE(seats IS NULL, "Missing", seats < 1 OR seats > 9, "Invalid", TO_STRING(ROUND(seats, 0))) | STATS car_count = COUNT(*) BY seat_bucket | SORT car_count DESC | LIMIT 15
